column8: orig stored-block parser uses g_inflateBitBuffer/g_zipCdReadCursor + InflateRefillInputBuffer; port replaces entire inflate path with zlib (-DTD5_INFLATE_USE_ZLIB) per ARCH-DIVERGENCE doc
orig builds fixed Huffman lit/dist tables (0x90x8 + 0x70x9 + 0x18x7 + 0x8x8; dist 0x1ex5) then calls Decode; port substitutes zlib
orig parses dynamic Huffman lengths (HLIT/HDIST/HCLEN) into g_inflateFixedHuffmanLitTable via &DAT_00474f00 code-length order; port substitutes zlib
orig DEFLATE top-level: reads BFINAL/BTYPE then dispatches stored/fixed/dynamic; checks g_zipRunningCrc32 vs g_zipExpectedCrc32; port substitutes zlib inflate()
MSVC CRT fpmath init: calls __cfltcvt_init + __IsProcessorFeaturePresent_fp + __init_fp_control; port links MinGW CRT which provides its own fpmath init
